name: Prisma Access (SASE)
description: Palo Alto Networks Prisma SASE API for managing security policies, remote networks, service connections, and zero trust network access

auth_config.note: OAuth 2.0 client credentials flow via auth.apps.paloaltonetworks.com

actions.name: List Security Rules
actions.description: Retrieve all security policy rules configured in Prisma Access

parameters.name: folder
parameters.description: Configuration folder: Shared, Mobile Users, Remote Networks, Service Connections

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of rules to return

actions.name: Create Security Rule
actions.description: Create a new security policy rule for traffic control

parameters.name: folder
parameters.description: Configuration folder to create the rule in

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Security rule definition including name, from/to zones, source/destination, application, service, action (allow/deny/drop/reset-client)

actions.name: List Address Objects
actions.description: Retrieve all address objects for use in security policies

parameters.name: folder
parameters.description: Configuration folder: Shared, Mobile Users, Remote Networks, Service Connections

actions.name: Create Address Object
actions.description: Create a new address object (IP, FQDN, or range) for blocking or policy use

parameters.name: folder
parameters.description: Configuration folder to create the object in

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Address object including name, ip_netmask/fqdn/ip_range, description, and tag

actions.name: List Remote Networks
actions.description: Retrieve all remote network (branch) connections in Prisma Access

actions.name: List Service Connections
actions.description: Retrieve all service connections (datacenter/HQ links) to Prisma Access

actions.name: List IKE Gateways
actions.description: Retrieve all IKE gateway configurations for IPSec VPN tunnels

actions.name: Push Configuration
actions.description: Push pending configuration changes to Prisma Access cloud

parameters.name: folders
parameters.description: List of configuration folders to push
